fields.title: Bedrock listen address
fields.description: The IP address Geyser binds its Bedrock (UDP) listener to. 0.0.0.0 listens on all interfaces.

fields.title: Bedrock listen port
fields.description: The UDP port Bedrock Edition players connect to. Must not be shared with any other UDP service.

fields.title: Clone remote port
fields.description: When enabled, overrides the Bedrock listen port to match the remote Java server's port instead of bedrock.port.

fields.title: Remote Java server address
fields.description: The address of the Java Edition server Geyser forwards Bedrock connections to. "auto" targets the local server when Geyser runs as a plugin.

fields.title: Remote Java server port
fields.description: The port of the Java Edition server Geyser forwards Bedrock connections to.

fields.title: Remote authentication type
fields.description: How Geyser authenticates Bedrock players against the remote Java server. Must match the remote server's own configuration — "floodgate" requires the Floodgate plugin on that server.

fields.title: Max Bedrock players
fields.description: Maximum number of Bedrock players Geyser will accept, shown in the Bedrock server list.

fields.title: Debug mode
fields.description: Enables verbose Geyser logging, useful for diagnosing connection issues. Leave off in normal operation.

fields.title: Ping passthrough
fields.description: Whether the Bedrock server-list ping shows the remote Java server's real MOTD/player count instead of Geyser's own defaults.

fields.title: Passthrough MOTD
fields.description: Shows the remote Java server's MOTD to Bedrock players in the server list, instead of Geyser's own.

fields.title: Command suggestions
fields.description: Enables command auto-suggestions for Bedrock players. Some server setups disable this to hide command structure.
